songs.title: Mr. Brightside
feed: “Mr. Brightside” by The Killers spends a 7th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 48 sales units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 195 streams units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 449,204 total units.
